name: Error Message Library
description: User-friendly, accessible error messages for common scenarios

good_error_messages: Explain what went wrong in plain language
Tell the user how to fix it
avoid: Blaming the user ('You did X wrong')

invalid_credentials.good: We couldn't find an account with that email and password combination. Please check your credentials and try again.
invalid_credentials.security_note: Don't reveal which field is wrong (email vs password) to prevent enumeration attacks

account_locked.message: Your account has been temporarily locked for security reasons after multiple failed login attempts.
account_locked.action: Try again in 15 minutes or reset your password to unlock immediately.

password_reset_required.message: For your security, you need to reset your password before continuing.
password_reset_required.action: Click the button below to reset your password.

session_expired.message: Your session has expired for security reasons.
session_expired.action: Please log in again to continue.
session_expired.helpful: Save your work before expiration with auto-save

email.message: Please enter a valid email address (e.g., name@example.com)

phone.message: Please enter a valid phone number (e.g., (555) 123-4567)
phone.show_format: Display expected format in helper text

url.message: Please enter a valid URL starting with http:// or https://

date.message: Please enter a valid date in MM/DD/YYYY format
date.provide_picker: Use native date picker when possible

too_short.generic: [Field] must be at least X characters
too_short.password_example: Password must be at least 8 characters long

too_long.message: [Field] must be less than X characters

password_weak.message: Password must include at least one uppercase letter, one number, and one special character
password_weak.realtime: Show requirements checklist that updates as user types

username_invalid.message: Username can only contain letters, numbers, and underscores

number_too_high.example: You can order a maximum of 10 items

date_in_past.message: Date must be in the future

date_too_far.message: Date cannot be more than X days/months in the future

offline.message: You appear to be offline. Please check your internet connection and try again.

timeout.message: The request is taking longer than expected. This might be due to a slow connection.
timeout.action: Would you like to keep waiting or try again?

server_error.user_facing: Something went wrong on our end. We're working to fix it.
server_error.action: Please try again in a few minutes.
server_error.helpful: Include error ID for support: 'Error ID: ABC123'
server_error.avoid: Exposing stack traces or technical details

rate_limited.message: You're doing that too quickly. Please wait a moment before trying again.
rate_limited.action: You can try again in X seconds.

not_authorized.message: You don't have permission to access this feature.
not_authorized.action: Contact your administrator if you believe this is a mistake.

camera.message: This feature needs access to your camera.
camera.action: Click 'Allow' in the browser prompt to continue.

location.message: We need your location to show nearby results.
location.action: Click 'Allow' when prompted, or enter your location manually.

notifications.action: Click 'Allow' to receive notifications, or adjust this later in settings.
notifications.optional: Make it clear notifications are optional

out_of_stock.message: This item is currently out of stock.
out_of_stock.action: Get notified when it's back in stock

reasons: The card details might be incorrect
Your bank might be blocking the transaction
payment_declined.action: Please check your payment details or try a different payment method.
payment_declined.support: Contact your bank if the problem persists

age_restriction.message: You must be 18 or older to access this content.
age_restriction.action: Please verify your age to continue.

file_too_large.message: This file is too large. Maximum file size is X MB.
file_too_large.action: Please choose a smaller file or compress your image.

invalid_file_type.message: This file type isn't supported. Please upload a JPG, PNG, or PDF file.

upload_failed.message: Upload failed. This might be due to a connection issue.
upload_failed.action: Please try again or choose a different file.
upload_failed.preserve: Don't lose other form data on failure

suggestions: Use fewer or more general terms

too_many_results.message: Your search returned too many results to display.
too_many_results.action: Try adding more specific terms to narrow your search.

planned.advance_notice: Scheduled maintenance on [date] from [time] to [time]. Some features may be unavailable.
planned.during: We're currently performing scheduled maintenance. We'll be back shortly.

unexpected.message: We're experiencing technical difficulties and are working to resolve them.
unexpected.updates: Link to status page for updates

deprecation.message: This feature will be discontinued on [date].
deprecation.action: Please switch to [new feature] before then.

do: Take responsibility when it's our fault

visual_elements: Icon to indicate error type (⚠️ warning, ❌ error, ℹ️ info)
Color coding (red for errors, yellow for warnings)
Highlight the problematic field in forms

placement.inline: Next to field for form validation

accessibility: Announce errors to screen readers with aria-live
Link error summary to specific fields with aria-describedby
Move focus to error on form submission

considerations: Write messages that can be easily translated
Account for text expansion (some languages are 30-40% longer)
Use placeholders for dynamic content: '{fieldName} is required'

checklist: Verify messages are clear to non-technical users
